paperTitle: FutureVLA: Joint Visuomotor Prediction for Vision-Language-Action Model
organization: Beihang University / Shanghai AI Lab / USTC / CUHK

benchmarks.label: LIBERO-Plus
benchmarks.detail: Suites: camera 50.4 · robot 68.8 · language 90 · light 97.9 · background 95.4 · noise 72.6 · layout 83.9 | Table 6 | Notes: Zero-shot evaluation on all 7 LIBERO-Plus perturbation dimensions.

benchmarks.label: SimplerEnv
benchmarks.detail: Suites: google robot vm 77.6 · google robot va 49.4 · widowx vm 63.6 | Tasks: pick coke can vm 97 · move near vm 83.8 · open close drawer vm 55.6 · put in drawer vm 74.1 · pick coke can va 80.5 · move near va 61.5 · open close drawer va 31.7 · put in drawer va 23.8 | Table 1, Table 2 | Notes: Reports Google Robot VM/VA and WidowX VM suites. Note: google_robot_vm/va here are 4-task averages including Put in Drawer; standard uses 3-task average.
